song_name: The Cranberries - Zombie - Red Hot Chili Peppers - Otherside - Linkin Park - Numb
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]  x4

[Verse 1 - Zombie]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Another head hangs lowly, child is slowly taken[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D/F#[/ch]
And the violence caused such silence, who are we mistaken[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
But you see it's not me, it's not my family[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]D/F#[/ch]
In your head, in your head, they are fighting[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
With their tanks and their bombs and their bombs and their guns[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D/F#[/ch]
in your head, in your head, they are crying[/tab]

[Chores - Otherside]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
 How long, how long will I slide?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Separate my siiii-iiide[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
I don't, don't believe it's baaa-aaad[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
Slittin' my throat it's all I ever[/tab]

[Verse 2 - Numb]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
  I'm tired of being what you want me to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Feeling so faithless lost under the surface[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
  Don't know what you're expecting of me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Put under the pressure of walking in your shoes[/tab]

(Caught in the undertow, just caught in the undertow)
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Every step I take is another mistake to you[/tab]

(Caught in the undertow, just caught in the undertow)


[Chorus - Numb]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
I've become so numb, I can't feel you there[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
I've become so tired, so much more aware[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
I'm becoming this, all I want to do[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
Is be more like me and be less like...[/tab]

[Otherside]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
 How long, how long will I slide?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Separate my siiii-iiide[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
I don't, don't believe it's baaa-aaad[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
Slittin' my throat it's all I ever[/tab]

[Zombie]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]
In your head, in your head, zombie, zombie, zombie[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]
What's in your head, in your head, zombie, zombie, zombie[/tab]


[Chorus - Numb]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
I've become so numb, I can't feel you there[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
I've become so tired, so much more aware[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
I'm becoming this, all I want to do[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
Is be more like me and be less like...[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
 How long, how long will I slide?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Separate my siiii-iiide[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
I don't, don't believe it's baaa-aaad[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
Slittin' my throat it's all I ever[/tab]

[Zombie otherside]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]
In your head, in your head, zombie, zombie, zombie[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]
What's in your head, in your head, zombie, zombie, zombie[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
With their tanks and their bombs and their bombs and their guns[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D/F#[/ch]
in your head, in your head, they are dying[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]
